name: Engineering AM convergence into AM Platform

dataIsolation.guard: Every Notion call is tenant-keyed and target data sources must be declared under the tenant parent page.

definitionOfDone: Engineering requests all eight platform modules in the approved order
Legacy Portal aliases are scoped to engineering only
Construction ticket UI and legacy API redirects are available
Production LINE webhook is switched to AM Platform and verified
Legacy engineering service is suspended after the observation window
